name: ts-bun-mcp
description: A Bun + TypeScript FastMCP starter template.

scripts.inspect: MCP_AUTO_OPEN_ENABLED=false bunx mcp-inspector bun run src/index.ts
scripts.validate: bun run check && bun --eval 'const mod = await import("./src/index"); if (!mod.server) throw new Error("Missing server export"); console.log("[validate] entry module imported successfully");'
